_comment: App Store screenshot copy keys. Spec source of truth: docs/marketing/screenshot-spec.md. EN copy is the picked top candidate from Part B of that spec. TR seed filled by narrative-designer/localizer; PH and ID may fall back to EN per cut-list #3 in GAME.md. Naming convention mirrors the existing key tables in en.json / tr.json (snake_case). These keys are NOT loaded at runtime — they are read by the Canva/Figma overlay composition dispatch.

screenshot_1_subhead.en: An 8-minute roguelite with a smile on every frame.
screenshot_1_subhead.tr: Her karesi tebessümlü, 8 dakikalık bir roguelite.

screenshot_2_subhead.en: Auto-attack, evolve, and watch a build come alive.
screenshot_2_subhead.tr: Otomatik saldır, evrim yap, kombin hayat bulsun.

screenshot_3_subhead.en: Tortoise tanks. Fox crits. Owl scales. Pick your style.
screenshot_3_subhead.tr: Kaplumbağa kalkan. Tilki kritik. Baykuş ölçek. Tarzını seç.

screenshot_4_subhead.en: Meadow, beach, forest, cavern, snow — each plays different.
screenshot_4_subhead.tr: Çayır, sahil, orman, mağara, kar — her biri ayrı oyun.

screenshot_5_subhead.en: Three offers, six builds, infinite runs.
screenshot_5_subhead.tr: Üç teklif, altı kombin, sonsuz tur.
